requirement: Universe source must be official exchange listings or licensed reference data
reason: Unofficial screeners can silently rewrite history.

requirement: Provider must expose delisted/inactive symbols or historical active windows
Provider must identify common stock versus ETF warrant unit ADR preferred or fund
reason: Security-type contamination invalidates event frequency estimates.

requirement: Provider must identify primary listing exchange
reason: Venue constraints are part of execution feasibility.

requirement: Probe must define max calls before execution
Probe must define whether raw payloads are retained before execution
